name: HR coordinators in small to medium-sized tech startups using BambooHR tool
description: For HR coordinators in small to medium-sized tech startups using BambooHR processing 5–15 new hires/month, inefficient onboarding causes delays in new hire productivity. We provide an onboarding assistant instead of manual onboarding processes using email and spreadsheets.
target_audience: HR coordinators in small to medium-sized tech startups using BambooHR
problem_solved: Inefficient onboarding processes lead to delays in new hire productivity.
